name: workflow state machine validates against the workflow state contract from cross-cutting section
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state.sh" --state-file /dev/stdin <<< '{"current_state":"unknown","history":[]}' 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_state=unknown' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
